fixTemplate: Use parameterized queries or ORM methods.
Move AWS credentials to environment variables or a secret manager.
Move API keys to environment variables or a secret manager.
Move Stripe keys to environment variables.
Use textContent or sanitize trusted HTML with a vetted sanitizer.
Avoid eval; use safer parsing or dispatch logic.
Use crypto.getRandomValues or node:crypto for security-sensitive randomness.

description: Auth route appears without visible rate-limit guard
fixTemplate: Apply rate limiting middleware to auth and session endpoints.
Set cookies with Secure enabled in production.
Set session cookies with HttpOnly enabled.

description: Remote HTTP URL used without TLS
fixTemplate: Use HTTPS for remote network calls.
Remove or mask secrets before logging.

description: Potential path traversal in file access
fixTemplate: Normalize and constrain paths to an allowed project directory.
Use TLS 1.2 or newer.

description: Production source maps may be exposed
fixTemplate: Disable production source maps or protect access.

description: CORS middleware found without visible security headers
fixTemplate: Add helmet or explicit CSP, HSTS, frame, and content-type headers.
Validate untrusted data before parsing or consuming it.

description: Shell command appears to include concatenated input
fixTemplate: Use execFile/spawn with argument arrays and strict input validation.

description: HTML form without an obvious CSRF token
fixTemplate: Include and validate a CSRF token for state-changing forms.
Move database passwords to environment variables or a secret manager.
